general.noPermission: You don't have permission to use this command.
general.botReady: Bot is ready! Logged in as {username}.
general.noPermissionDetailed: You don't have permission to use this command. Required level: {level}

roles.cannotGiveHigherRole: You can't give a role higher than your own!
roles.cannotRemoveHigherRole: You can't remove a role higher than your own!

verification.embedDescription:
Welcome to our server! Click the button below to get access to all channels.

📜 By verifying, you agree to the **server rules**.
👤 After verification, you'll have access to all channels.
verification.successDescription: Welcome **{user}**! You can now access all server channels.
verification.setupDesc: Send the verification message to a channel
verification.setupSuccess: ✅ Verification message sent to this channel!
verification.messageSent: ✅ Verification message sent to this channel!

welcome.title: 👋 Welcome!
welcome.description:
**{user}** just joined the server!

To access the server, go to the verification channel and click the verify button.

You are our **{count}th** member! 🎉

moderation.banOnlyOwner: Only the server owner can ban members.
moderation.kickOnlyAdmin: Only admins and above can kick members.
moderation.autoMuted: ⚠️ User reached maximum warnings and was auto-muted!
moderation.aiAutoWarning:
⚠️ **Auto Warning:** Your message was found to violate community guidelines.
📝 Category: {category}
moderation.modHistoryEmpty: No moderation records found for this user.
moderation.oldMessagesWarning: ⚠️ Messages older than 14 days cannot be deleted.
moderation.autoMuteApplied: ⚠️ {user} has been muted for {duration} minutes due to reaching {maxWarnings} warnings.
moderation.banDmMessage: 🔨 You have been banned from {server}. Reason: {reason}
moderation.kickDmMessage: 👢 You have been kicked from {server}. Reason: {reason}
moderation.rulesViolationWarning:
⚠️ **Warning:** Your message was found to violate server rules.
📝 Reason: {reason}

setup.title: 🏗️ Server Setup Complete!
setup.description: Server has been set up successfully. Summary below:
setup.onlyOwner: Only the server owner can use this command.
setup.alreadyActive: ⚠️ There is already an active setup interview on this server. Use `/ai-setup-cancel` to cancel it.
setup.defaultDesc: The recommended server structure has been applied. All channels, roles and systems are ready!
setup.ownerOnly: Only the server owner can use this command.
setup.sessionAlreadyActive: ⚠️ There is already an active setup interview on this server. Use `/ai-setup-cancel` to cancel it.
setup.aiNotConfigured: ❌ AI features not configured. Add `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` to your `.env` file.
setup.aiSetupFooter: Reply in this channel to continue. Cancel: /ai-setup-cancel
setup.setupCompleteSummary: Server has been set up successfully. Summary below:
setup.defaultSetupCompleteDesc: The recommended server structure has been applied. All channels, roles and systems are ready!

ai.moderationWarning: ⚠️ Auto Warning: Your message was found to violate community guidelines.
ai.noActiveSession: ❌ No active AI setup interview found.
ai.error: ❌ AI could not respond. Try again later.
ai.notConfigured: ❌ AI features not configured. Add `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` to your `.env` file.
ai.chatResetSuccess: ✅ Your AI chat history has been reset!
ai.chatResetNone: You don't have an active chat history.
ai.setupInterviewFooter: Reply in this channel to continue. Cancel: /ai-setup-cancel
ai.historyReset: ✅ Your AI chat history has been reset!
ai.responseError: ❌ AI could not respond. Try again later.

help.title: 🛡️ AdminBot — Command List
help.description: AI-powered server administration bot. All commands:
help.verificationDesc: `/verify-setup` — Send the verification message to a channel
help.rolesDesc:
`/role-menu` — Send a role menu (game/platform/color)
`/give-role` — Give a role to a user
`/remove-role` — Remove a role from a user
help.moderationDesc:
`/warn` — Warn a user (sends DM)
`/mute` — Mute (timeout)
`/kick` — Kick from server
`/ban` — Ban (Owner only)
`/timeout` — Give a timeout
`/clear` — Bulk delete messages
help.modRecordsDesc:
`/warnings` — View user's warnings
`/mod-history` — View full moderation history
help.levelingDesc:
`/rank` — View your level and XP
`/leaderboard` — Top members by level
help.setupDesc:
`/setup` — Auto-setup server (Owner)
`/ai-setup` — AI-guided server setup
`/ai-setup-apply` — Apply AI plan
`/ai-setup-cancel` — Cancel AI setup
help.aiDesc:
`/ai-chat status` — AI chat status
`/ai-chat reset` — Reset chat history
Chat with AI in the AI chat channel
help.infoDesc:
`/help` — Show this message
`/ping` — Check bot latency
help.roleManagementValue:

roleMenus.gameDesc: Select the games you play! You can pick multiple.
roleMenus.platformDesc: Which platforms are you active on?
roleMenus.colorDesc: Pick your name color! You can only choose one.

aiChat.historyReset: ✅ Your AI chat history has been reset!
aiChat.responseError: ❌ AI could not respond. Try again later.
aiChat.rateLimited: You are sending too fast! Please wait {seconds} seconds.

fixPerms.commandDesc: Fix verification permissions for existing servers
fixPerms.title: 🔧 Permissions Fixed!
fixPerms.description: Verification channels have been updated so new members can always see them, even when the bot is offline.
fixPerms.noChangesDesc: All verification channels already have the correct permissions.

blocklist.addDesc: Add a word to the blocklist
blocklist.removeDesc: Remove a word from the blocklist
blocklist.wordOption: The word to add or remove
blocklist.tooShort: Word must be at least 2 characters.
blocklist.alreadyExists: The word `{word}` is already in the blocklist.
blocklist.notFound: The word `{word}` is not in the blocklist.
blocklist.addedDesc: Added `{word}` to the blocklist. It will now be auto-moderated.
blocklist.empty: No custom blocked words have been added yet. The default list is still active.

suggest.commandDesc: Send a suggestion or feedback to moderators
suggest.tooShort: Your suggestion must be at least 10 characters.
suggest.noStaffChannel: Staff channel not found. Please notify an administrator.
suggest.sent: ✅ Your suggestion has been sent to the moderators! Thank you.
suggest.sendFailed: ❌ Failed to send suggestion. Please try again later.
